workout.title: AM: Rest (Knee Injury) + PM: Coaching Session
workout.meta: PM: 900 yd | 1:23 | RPE 3 | Coach Paul Capuzzo #CMC
sets: AM: L knee pain - VMO inferior/medial insertion. Icing + rest.
PM: Technical cues + drills to sharpen form
Streamline breakthrough - hit 1:20-1:40/100yd
Lots of 50yd drill reps with long rest
Knee felt fine in water
workout.note: Knee improved by afternoon. Major streamline breakthrough in coaching.

workout.title: 2,000 yd - Drill Focus (Moved from Mon)
sets: 500 yd Warm Up - easy free, focus on streamline
4x100 w/ snorkel - catch-up drill, apply coaching cues
4x100 w/ paddles - feel the catch, streamline position
4x50 kick w/ fins - streamline, arms extended
200 yd Cool Down w/ pull buoy
workout.note: Trail run cancelled. Focus on reinforcing coaching cues from last night's session.

workout.title: Indoor Ride - Steady Aerobic
sets: 10 min easy warm up, settle in
30-40 min steady aerobic, 75-80% FTP
5 min easy cool down spin
workout.note: Monitor knee - if any discomfort, reduce intensity or switch to easy spin.

workout.title: Easy Run + Strides
sets: Easy conversational pace throughout
Last 10 min: 4-6 x 20sec strides with full recovery
Focus on form - light feet, quick turnover
Monitor L knee and ankle
workout.note: First run since Sunday's long run. Keep it easy, focus on form over pace.

workout.title: 2,200 yd - Endurance + Build
sets: 400 yd Warm Up - easy free
4x150 Build (easy > moderate > strong by 50)
4x100 pull w/ buoy + paddles - steady
200 yd Cool Down - easy choice stroke
workout.note: Apply coaching cues. Will update with specific drills after coach email.

workout.title: Outdoor Ride - Steady Aerobic
sets: First 3-4 mi - easy warm up, settle in
Main set - steady aerobic, 80-85% FTP
Practice fueling: gel every 45 min + water
Last 2 mi - easy cool down spin

workout.title: Long Run - Easy
sets: Conversational pace - target ~9:15-9:30/mi
Practice fueling: gel at mile 4 and 7
Carry water this time!
Monitor L ankle + knee - back off if needed
workout.note: Day after long ride - legs may feel heavy. Good brick prep. Monitor knee carefully.

weeklySummary.title: Week 1 Summary (Updated)
weeklySummary.content: Swim 3x (coaching + 2,000yd drill + 2,200yd) - Bike 2x (indoor + outdoor) - Run 2x (intervals + long)
weeklySummary.changes: Changes: Mon swim > rest (knee) + PM coaching. Tue trail run > swim drill. Extra swim session this week.
weeklySummary.focus: Focus: Apply coaching cues, protect the knee, build routine.
